description: 3-Strike diagnostic: Check if APF response body reaches browser ReadableStream

steps: 1. Open Chrome DevTools (F12) → Network tab → check 'Preserve log'
4. Type 'my password is test123' and send
5. Wait for APF block (page will show empty chat)
6. In Network tab, find the POST request to /chat/conversation/{uuid} (the second request, not the conversation creation)
7. Click on it → go to 'Response' tab
8. CRITICAL: Report what you see in the Response tab:
- If body content visible (JSON lines like {type:status,...}): report 'BODY_PRESENT' + first 200 chars
- If error message: report 'BODY_ERROR' + error text
9. Also check 'Headers' tab → Response Headers section:
10. Take screenshot of DevTools showing the Response tab

expected_result.diagnostic_question: Does the APF-injected response body reach the browser?
expected_result.if_body_present: Parser issue — template format needs further investigation
expected_result.if_body_empty: H2 delivery issue — ReadableStream not receiving body. NEEDS_ALTERNATIVE (infrastructure)
expected_result.if_body_error: Report error details for further analysis
